text: Welcome aboard, guide_sam — excited to have you with us as an event_helper. If you want pointers on where to start, the welcome channel is a good first stop.
Welcome aboard, newbie_kim — happy to have you here as a member. Say hi in the welcome channel whenever you're ready.
Welcome aboard, helper_alex — glad to have you as a moderator. Jump into the welcome channel anytime if you need a hand getting oriented.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina — thrilled to have you join as a mentor. Thanks for bringing your experience to the community.
